mongoMissing: MONGODB_URI is not configured. Set it in .env before running `audithex project`.
invalidRuleIds: --disable must be a comma-separated list of rule ids like R001,R002.

create.summary: Create a new named scan project in MongoDB.
create.exists: A project named {{name}} already exists. Pick a different name or delete the old one first.

flags.name: Project name (must be unique).
flags.rootPath: Absolute path to the project directory to scan.
flags.description: Free-form description shown in the web UI.
flags.disable: Comma-separated rule ids to disable for this project (e.g. R013,R019).

list.empty: No projects yet. Create one with `audithex project create`.

flags.json: Emit JSON instead of the table.

show.summary: Print one project's full document as JSON.

delete.summary: Delete a project. The scans attached to it stay in the database.
delete.confirm: Delete project {{name}}? Existing scans are kept.
